race.description: Free Kids Movie On The Big Screen Good Friday Hcp
race.comment: ARTILLERY FIRE (5) missed a neck here and then lifted her figures again, easily winning a CL1 over 1220m as the market expected. Races forward and draws the inside gate this evening. Keeps the 1.5kg claim, and the longer sprint shouldn't bother. She can go on with it. AZONTO (2) has returned to racing further improved. Just missed here over 1200m second-up, and the step-up to 1400m suits. Draws wide so will need a touch of luck. Stablemate BAYSIDE (3) has the ability but has been mixing trips. Went close over a short course on the synthetic last time, following a 2L defeat at Hobart over a mile. 1400m is his sweet spot, and he maps to get every chance. JENNI THE CAT (7) was last seen 40 days ago at Stakes level over a middle distance. Goes well on the fresh side and won at her only go at this track/trip. Maps well and is worth keeping onside.
